title: Spirotecoma woodfredensis
taxonomy: Spirotecoma woodfredensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. It belongs to the genus Spirotecoma, which is a group of plants native to Central and South America. Spirotecoma woodfredensis is further classified as a member of the order Lamiales, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. This classification places Spirotecoma woodfredensis within the broader context of angiosperm diversity. Spirotecoma woodfredensis is a unique and interesting species within the Bignoniaceae family.
